title: santalodes heterophyllum
intro: Santalodes heterophyllum, also known as Himalayan Sandalwood, is a small, deciduous shrub native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Santalodes heterophyllum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Santalodes heterophyllum is often prepared as an essential oil, powder, or tea, and is used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
